overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a medieval fantasy village and cemetery during golden hour. The character walks from the outskirts through a stone gate into a ghost-filled cemetery, ascends stone stairs, then exits back into the village toward a stream and bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path approaching medieval village outskirts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the village cemetery entrance

entered.detail: cluster of stone and timber houses with steep roofs in the distance
unpaved dirt trail winding toward the village
misty mountains forming the backdrop behind the village
tall gothic spires of a distant castle visible above the village
low stone wall running alongside the path
weathered wooden signpost with directional markers
ornate iron and stone gate marking the cemetery entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward a medieval fantasy village during golden hour. Stone buildings and distant castle spires are visible against a mountainous backdrop, with a stone cemetery gate looming ahead.

events.description: passing through the stone cemetery gate into the graveyard
first ghostly figure appears walking among the cemetery crypts

agents.ego_description: walking through the cemetery gate and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure in white robes walking slowly between the crypts

entered.detail: stone mausoleums and tomb structures with gothic arches
cobblestone walkway leading through the cemetery

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone gate into a sheltered cemetery. The ground changes to cobblestone as stone crypts line the path, and a ghostly figure in white robes appears walking among the tombs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cemetery with stone stairs and multiple ghosts

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone staircase in the cemetery
multiple ghostly figures now visible wandering through the cemetery

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while ghostly figures wander nearby

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure standing motionless near a crypt entrance
ghostly figure walking across the cobblestone path

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the cemetery

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase through the upper cemetery area. Multiple translucent ghostly figures wander among the crypts and trees, creating an eerie atmosphere as the path winds higher.

events.description: exiting the cemetery through the stone gate back into the open village

agents.ego_description: leaving the cemetery and entering the village outskirts

entered.detail: arched stone bridge crossing a stream in the distance
narrow waterway flowing through the village

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cemetery through the stone gate, returning to the open village outskirts. The ground returns to dirt as medieval buildings line the path, with a stone bridge and stream visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with stream and stone bridge

events.description: encountering living villagers near the stream and bridge

agents.ego_description: walking toward the village center past other villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in dark robes walking along the dirt path
villager standing near the stream bank

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the village center toward the stone bridge, passing living villagers in dark robes. The stream runs alongside the path as the sun sets behind the medieval buildings, casting long golden rays across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the outskirts of a medieval village into a spectral cemetery and back out toward a riverside bridge during the golden hour. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path toward distant castle spires and mountains before passing through a stone gate into a sheltered cemetery. As the ground shifts to cobblestone, the scene becomes eerie with translucent ghostly figures wandering among stone crypts and winding staircases. The camera then follows the character back through the gate to the open village outskirts, where the terrain returns to dirt and the path opens up toward a distant stream. Finally, the movement leads through the village center past robed inhabitants, ending as the sun sets behind medieval buildings and casts long golden rays across a stone bridge.
